title: draba poluniniana
intro: Draba poluniniana, also known as Polunin's whitlow grass or Polunin's draba, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Draba poluniniana include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Draba polunina is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
